textByHash.a4b1018c107b14ee35b2a46e9b36fdc9d4e4d9fc: Though I appreciate your efforts in our trials, I'm afraid I can't speak to you .
textByHash.a39a54e96421a5ab54a2d485e6349a2111b414ee: Hmm... If the Chieftain can still trust you, so can I. How may I be of assistance?
textByHash.ab200f2fd95d35c0ec918dc7d341299ca0fb8303: You can tell me anything. What's the matter?
textByHash.b6b98f1491a0011cfae3c65abee1f66787a2ee0e: Are you serious? I'm a busy man...
textByHash.7b7c9b3c55d206658eeb257f6363589e1f5c1bbb: Very well. I'll clear your mind of any memories you have of your...
textByHash.8e6887a24384357ade31f86dab90b62d5de1d09e: I won't be able to speak with you after this. The others might start to get suspicious.
textByHash.b5a6c2d85a51014b61beadbf05e1eb1d1868ed89: Now be gone with you, exile!
textByHash.d92bf1568737a1706a30e788610b35b245dd88ef: Er.... Yes, because I AM the Fremennik Seer.
textByHash.6af45c493834f8ab96d89dbc34ed54f4366d236c: You require a divination of the weather? This is a simple matter for me, but I will require something in return from you for this small service.
textByHash.3786528fc8dee3db7ba8884284076daba77b53cd: Do not fret, outerlander; it is a fairly simple matter. I require a bodyguard for protection. Find someone willing to offer me this service.
textByHash.17356d0a7b725c3871691223bed643da94a59705: If I did, then I would simply have asked them myself now, wouldn't I, outerlander?
textByHash.03e0b3f280fea33c9cc9a2ac770e297b219e5f22: I have already told you outerlander; You may have a reading from me when I have a signed contract from a warrior guaranteeing my protection.
textByHash.a6e0eb0ca977fbf29d616b4470281192d2e84339: You have not only persuaded one of the Fremennik to act as a servant to me, but you have enlisted the aid of mighty Thorvald himself???
textByHash.6bbd2cf5d290e6fd3b0315e45855394746511159: You may take this forecast with my blessing outerlander. You have offered me the greatest security I can imagine.
textByHash.3dea84d8e797c47c4cd265ee08e8309e7103764e: That is not true, outerlander. Although I see glimpses of the future all of the time, using my powers brings the attention of the gods to me.
textByHash.e4bf53e0dc9abc4e81abd1f2a39ada06328d9ff9: Some of the gods are spiteful and cruel, and I fear if I use my powers too much then I will meet with unpredictable accidents. This is why I needed protection.
textByHash.39c4331227828970b7b844b42f0c1087e0b5b056: That is correct outerlander, but you will need to go and retrieve your equipment from your bank account yourself, manually.
textByHash.feb7de96f382f5dfa529f42aecf149f32de7ff62: Alas, my spell is not very accurate, so it will deposit everything you have upon you into your bank, not just your armour and weapons.
textByHash.ea8364d815aed75a945710f524b113e36c5ac89d: I am sorry outerlander, the spell is not working.
textByHash.fb13708afefeb048c2ceeafdf8748d0b6dfc29d5: The task is done. I wish you luck with your test, outerlander.
textByHash.f42219e5f787001a46bd0f88560c8a31fa41673d: Hello outerlander. What do you want?
textByHash.ed6c1e4b2397c220629c3b7ecc6c6a076df087cc: Are you now? Well that is interesting. Usually outerlanders do not concern themselves with our ways like that.
textByHash.878c8d227ed2a8280682e284c612a86cc658bb41: I am one of the members of the council of elders, and should you be able to prove to me that you have something to offer my clan
textByHash.52736ab9408dc98bec8dc51e17b0592a003eac49: I will vote in your favour at the next meeting.
textByHash.ce3099d38a70bbc54d7dcfb85658d840123d69ea: Well, I have but a simple test. This building behind me is my house. Inside I have constructed a puzzle.
textByHash.01e4ca38ce4b696962fc81f4132888afe39ca8a1: As a Seer to the clan, I value intelligence very highly, so you may think of it as an intelligence test of sorts.
textByHash.6f207622bb85f27d714410a744610e71a37d865a: That is the opinion that outerlanders usually hold of my people, it is true. But that is because people often confuse knowledge with wisdom.
textByHash.f3cac69671986d2e14920f0a144a2c5888914526: My puzzle tests not what you know, but what you can work out. All members of our clan have been tested when they took their trials.
textByHash.069aaca0f3a0b9d86cf54d352c3c42433e16da14: Well, firstly you must enter my house with no items, weapons or armour. Then it is a simple matter of entering through one door and leaving by the other.
textByHash.2d9fd6fd01b8f5a44ff31dc78087786c94722176: That is correct outerlander. Everything you need to complete the puzzle you will find inside the building. Nothing more.
textByHash.548ec9005002ad46be3ef1114516546c329720f5: So what say you outerlander? You think you have the wit to earn yourself my vote?
textByHash.21e7580b10a35e260bbf5ce0332ba7b43373d0d0: Ah, I see your problem outerlander. The nearest bank to here is the place known to outerlanders as the Seers Village. It is some way South.
textByHash.3db40d43b7d1159e6b48ccae878e303cfbacfd0f: I do however have an alternative, should you wish to take it.
textByHash.0a63c371f0455a5854b158d9f29bdcc3b1e9e31a: I can store all the weapons, armour and items that you have upon you directly into your bank account.
textByHash.86f3519de0ada163e6aae83bf57c1c757a09999e: This will tax what little magic I possess however, so you will have to manually travel to the bank to withdraw them again.
textByHash.5c2165d21cd841c12ebea4dcf0ee54f40e65eeb2: What say you outerlander? you wish me to do this for you?
textByHash.e987e464a0c665d0a4f9dd0a4e9de0b40595b07c: You may attempt my little task when you have deposited your equipment in the bank.
textByHash.c0840132214d3df46d323407aca591f210bfb37e: That is correct outerlander, but as I say, I can use my small skill in magic to send your items directly into your bank account from here.
textByHash.baf437987269438a8bd099728c18286bd9393268: You will need to manually go to the bank to withdraw them again however. Would you like me to perform this small spell upon you, outerlander?
textByHash.30115759e2b8706895866517b83b42fc9c62fbf0: That is correct outerlander. Be warned it is not as easy as it may at first sound...
textByHash.f47195c762f7da867cc82e89b50a461123c5d3a8: Incredible! To have solved my puzzle so quickly! I have no choice but to vote in your favour!
textByHash.afb715201b75bec3547ccf44b726cf82d5295b74: Absolutely, outerlander. Your wisdom in passing my test marks you as worthy in my eyes.
textByHash.fbab32d0897fabfd67fc036b11ee981d31908970: I have no interest in talking to you just now outerlander.
textByHash.5a401d1631e4deb4fe5dea55c79f1305338b9466: I see great things in your future outerlander, but I will not go against the wishes of the tribe, and will not make armour for an outerlander.
textByHash.d27d19f05fc69012d09759bd1c9af821ba2e13fe: You may try and gain a dispensation from Chieftain Brundt, but I suspect you will be unsuccessful...
textByHash.3547c7622923119a6375a2773599fdb7b10f7325: Hey! Outerlander! That is my house! Who do you think you are to just barge into my home without asking?
textByHash.1a76c7e448523ef1b7f13d2c26b3bb2ec93778db: It was a rhetorical question, outerlander. Now get lost. I do not appreciate intruders in my home.
textByHash.2d3dd7f93bf335e651811fefe60b5df2aa62b881: Greetings to you brother ! What brings you to see me again?
textByHash.1b53d7d8923f64fd0cd60528b150d9f388cc1f33: Greetings to you sister ! What brings you to see me again?
textByHash.d55746ca1c633160e437cd04d50462983cc93a65: Ah, you would like a prediction? I do not see that that would be so difficult... wait a moment...
textByHash.a76ab9b56c261109942c433869fbf2f4413a4e25: Here is your prediction: The enemy called fire giant is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.1f353c03e62ad2c50a90033f1271000dcba86100: Here is your prediction: The enemy called ghost is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.698369e784d031cb9f0769c1cd912d8ba25e0331: Here is your prediction: The enemy called goblin is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.25edca2e63035ffa8b55a6301e9830dbfba5a6cc: Here is your prediction: The enemy called green dragon is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.ae5c78bdd06324187c8aa6083ddbff90447bf324: Here is your prediction: The enemy called hobgoblin is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.255d6a88c3a57bd2fa4590e32079767d7e7675cb: Here is your prediction: The enemy called lesser demon is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.bea965e677fc8de1052e3a3454fa2dca610047f4: Here is your prediction: The enemy called moss giant is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.5ef43183ae7be2b2d129a67f19401957c27ff4a2: Here is your prediction: The enemy called ogre is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.e89d15166dceea7e17efc647e57601ef3c121992: Here is your prediction: The enemy called skeleton is your lucky totem this day.
textByHash.fa838481b29781e3591ec539c3eadd5805f5bc10: Here is your prediction: The enemy called zombie is your lucky totem this day.

textByHash.65d6d4db11891c8072ee4f6e0583e94a3246e67d: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a crossbow in combat today.
textByHash.664ff7abb4fb38c4397676909c97c102e65f99c3: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a dagger in combat today.
textByHash.6f2b94880dac85413b30e51b3cdd9d5084f15106: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a javelin in combat today.
textByHash.a6d165cf8e07542879fd75994fecb1ea2833e1c2: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a long sword in combat today.
textByHash.ea30f4f09c89c07ebd2d4fdaf6a6f8b418e68c0c: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a mace in combat today.
textByHash.ddd43a71572f6fd387f56c3eb96eac1635139058: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a scimitar in combat today.
textByHash.cf351fa0a3c902ca4b36bce12e1923f7e9effe82: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a short sword in combat today.
textByHash.ead6af71ae0e9979dfc1038cb22624621a852c96: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a spear in combat today.
textByHash.3fc979d6c27c133556b7750f17843c0c4f70d022: Here is your prediction: The stars tell me that you should use a warhammer in combat today.
textByHash.334bb0974702ce34d7f62bc1c52c8bea366dff62: Here is your prediction: The place called Al Kharid will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.c6d2d0160d98edd214c56ceaefea04f666d73c25: Here is your prediction: The place called Ardougne will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.32e07d313d17e10d6e304cdd186dc6ccc9dbe761: Here is your prediction: The place called Burthorpe will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.daeac5ea5cb6695ce6fbb1fb656dcfdd37f3ba38: Here is your prediction: The place called Canifis will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.0a5460a37e58a1cac69c41de4a954407c387367c: Here is your prediction: The place called Falador will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.d7212aaa6bb572f4948afbf7d67c0618741ff442: Here is your prediction: The place called Karamja will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.b45aa054dcb60d4372ae98e9a069f102b02c722e: Here is your prediction: The place called Varrock will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.ed4a58d307375345ac2e45bd3bf39f5959776379: Here is your prediction: The place called The Wilderness will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.fa6e09a3f6a12a25b9f9958a0711f16f104ac087: Here is your prediction: The place called Yanille will be worth your time to visit.
textByHash.61c99711101f8d801bf9545b7e16b66f3b755b25: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Agility today.
textByHash.412e3c4c32fd6133777dd99dd258c06a1ea47b5d: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Cooking today.
textByHash.0a8add015f7a53cba3d4bc68a5bdb07e7b44c1d6: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Crafting today.
textByHash.4b5c7590da064413c70532468dbfa101bdd27625: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Fishing today.
textByHash.a3fb0ebc1d14e768db6758a7fb3548815d67ca0a: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Fletching today.
textByHash.5c7ba19d35db2997dbe9708f34966ba2603dcc8d: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Herblore today.
textByHash.f658426807d92eb915da4fad5dd32f9cff91975b: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Mining today.
textByHash.87e04df0b2fa77a9c39d7551ab3a09367426106b: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Runecrafting today.
textByHash.50bd260caadbc36d35faaf18492f207732ba00d2: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Smithing today.
textByHash.a7fbd86e0adb0edd33294773dc19741df62fcd46: Here is your prediction: You would be wise to train the skill Thieving today.
textByHash.a49c71aeabec120ded2271a0df662c982073161f: Here is your prediction: The colour black will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.73238201a7be4892360bb4d63632e81e899ee5c1: Here is your prediction: The colour blue will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.679aad249223bf24f5d16254e86eefe89145d32a: Here is your prediction: The colour brown will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.5b48d534769ef0026e2701e1b23b98481740fb29: Here is your prediction: The colour cyan will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.8d84fc0c0c4a7e0ac35de2b83194f49fe86eb011: Here is your prediction: The colour green will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.3aff5a4b59e819db9376a7ee7846f1a4d307e346: Here is your prediction: The colour pink will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.20f269607f59f8ee59511b1f4a3f57e834bef28f: Here is your prediction: The colour purple will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.a7dd6cbf86a4768ec1bf26f9ad2b1e2e73d663cb: Here is your prediction: The colour red will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.8791296cf58ac02e5e63e4ef8c05fa384ccc0534: Here is your prediction: The colour white will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.45e17fbca2c9ce3247cbd9580346d3dc7af54a19: Here is your prediction: The colour yellow will bring you luck this day.
textByHash.a17089db2b2b0a16f36b18e5b6710bf35025b3e4: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number one.
textByHash.a0dac30bc5b6b4d5113dad36cc2cc74a22b4e202: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number two.
textByHash.7a17b79b1e9b92d514dbdae94405c6de9c13aadd: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number three.
textByHash.6986e580e0d44162ab4f9709ecff57079445e420: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number four.
textByHash.149b296e001680630575819306edad42602f9c06: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number five.
textByHash.4d4e9543d235994e074679f71d65089184a7b4a9: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number six.
textByHash.05faa79e0d1084a7d6d36ca834fce67f1f6eebed: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number seven.
textByHash.3ed8a4c6f0b80686774451c18a987411122c600c: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number eight.
textByHash.09f8183063b19156f33138cf16aa861e720fe302: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number nine.
textByHash.4744484352631286f02c52895a82a77ffd3868ba: Here is your prediction: You will find luck today with the number ten.
textByHash.d726eb4750440f9d5cb096ec28a7b0f7e0b095e2: As you wish. What kind of armour were you thinking of exactly?
textByHash.3a3bf9c595b3690f3781ed48ee83236499ad0027: I am afraid it will cost you 5,000 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?
textByHash.c8f61dc1b5a4c36e0fcde04e9156b9bfdae8a529: Ah, a helm to make any seer proud! Did you want me to make you another while I am at it?
textByHash.3c3a0597ff2cd53634c08d449cc6458a70bcdc8d: My apologies , but I will need you to bring me 1 piece of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 skull piece and 5,000 coins before I can make this helm for you.
textByHash.575666a321cac00d5484dbd7614825454eea247c: I am afraid it will cost you 10,000 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?
textByHash.bf4c445d56d5047e521b4d407b1c44c006873ecd: The seers of legend all wore just such armour! Did you want me to craft you another piece?
textByHash.4f57610399508b11961d55336e2041406d1ec039: I am sorry , but I need 3 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 ribcage piece and 10,000 coins to make you this armour...
textByHash.5222cdbbecc182bf2781f07f4bed0dbfa103fd74: I am afraid it will cost you 7,500 coins to make that for you... Is that okay?
textByHash.03ce3558fb52c3b48daa218ae5eec36f577ab4bf: Ah, I used to wear just such a piece of armour to battle in my youth... Do you want me to make you another pair of legs while I am doing it anyway?
textByHash.455eda2ba4d2f39c70e87bc4e0e3af88ad13e42f: I am very sorry , but I will require 2 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 fibula piece and 7,500 coins to make this type of leg armour.
textByHash.b81d3dfa729c93c7d8e2eb5586a09fb71b4c7484: Surely a smith would be better placed to help you with that?
textByHash.4c0e954f990cc3a62a8a1257ebfc03d11d80698e: Hmm... So the things you're planning to make are totally above board?
textByHash.1e5c8321f3b1935902076c7255f90e1b1131a84d: Ah, well as long as it's not one of those kind of empires, then I see no problems.
textByHash.d3ed79e022e9356aab8c373ddc4f5047f384f86a: I cannot do that for you until you have completed the easy tier of the Fremennik achievement diary.
